Looking at the policy again: "You can receive at most 2 referral bonuses in any rolling 7-day window." This seems to refer to bonuses received, not referrals in progress. The Silver referral is IN_PROGRESS, meaning the bonus hasn't been paid yet.

But I should also check if there are any other restrictions. Let me also consider:
